languages.text: "Гильдия моя не может похвастаться столь знатными клиентами, как Ваша Светлость. Мы делаем оружие для невзыскательной публики. Впрочем, с радостью примем у вас оружейный хлам на переработку — и возьмемся за индивидуальные заказы, если вам будет угодно!"

traits.locale_text: "Гильдия моя не может похвастаться столь знатными клиентами, как Ваше Благородие. Мы делаем оружие для невзыскательной публики. Впрочем, с радостью примем у вас оружейный хлам на переработку — и возьмемся за индивидуальные заказы, если вам будет угодно!"

"Гильдия моя не может похвастаться столь знатными клиентами, как Ваша Светлость. Мы делаем оружие для невзыскательной публики. Впрочем, с радостью примем у вас оружейный хлам на переработку — и возьмемся за индивидуальные заказы, если вам будет угодно!"

languages.text: "My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undiscerning public. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"
languages.original_text: "Гильдия моя не может похвастаться столь знатными клиентами, как Ваша Светлость. Мы делаем оружие для невзыскательной публики. Впрочем, с радостью примем у вас оружейный хлам на переработку — и возьмемся за индивидуальные заказы, если вам будет угодно!"

traits.locale_text: "My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undemanding crowd. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"

"My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undemanding crowd. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"

"My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undiscerning public. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"

"My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undiscerning public. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"

"My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undiscerning public. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"

languages.text: « Ma guilde ne peut pas se vanter d'avoir des clients aussi distingués que vous, Votre Seigneurie. Nous fabriquons des armes pour le grand public. Quoi qu'il en soit, si vous avez des armes bonnes à jeter, nous pouvons les reprendre pour les recycler. Nous sommes également à votre service si vous souhaitez passer commande ! »
languages.original_text: "My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undiscerning public. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"

traits.locale_text: « Ma guilde ne peut pas se vanter d'avoir des clients aussi distingués que vous, Votre Seigneurie. Nous fabriquons des armes pour le grand public. Quoi qu'il en soit, si vous avez des armes bonnes à jeter, nous pouvons les reprendre pour les recycler. Nous sommes également à votre service si vous souhaitez passer commande ! »

languages.text: "Meine Gilde kann nicht mit Fug und Recht behaupten, so angesehene Kunden wie Sie zu haben, Eure Lordschaft. Wir stellen Waffen für die unbedarfte Öffentlichkeit her. Dennoch nehmen wir gerne Ihre Waffenreste zum Recyceln an — und nehmen auch individuelle Aufträge an, wenn Sie es wünschen!"
languages.original_text: "My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undiscerning public. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"

traits.locale_text: "Meine Gilde kann nicht mit Fug und Recht behaupten, so angesehene Kunden wie Sie zu haben, Eure Lordschaft. Wir stellen Waffen für die unbedarfte Öffentlichkeit her. Dennoch nehmen wir gerne Ihre Waffenreste zum Recyceln an — und nehmen auch individuelle Aufträge an, wenn Sie es wünschen!"

languages.text: "Mi gremio no puede pretender con razón tener clientes distinguidos como usted, Su Señoría. Fabricamos armas para el público no entendido. Aun así, aceptaremos encantados los restos de armas que pueda tener para reciclar... ¡y aceptaremos encargos individuales, si así lo desea!".
languages.original_text: "My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undiscerning public. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"

traits.locale_text: "Mi gremio no puede pretender con razón tener clientes distinguidos como usted, Su Señoría. Fabricamos armas para el público no entendido. Aun así, aceptaremos encantados los restos de armas que pueda tener para reciclar... ¡y aceptaremos encargos individuales, si así lo desea!".

languages.text: "Loncam sizin gibi seçkin müşterilere sahip olduğunu iddia edemez, Lord Hazretleri. Bizler anlayışsız halk için silah üretiyoruz. Yine de, geri dönüşüm için elinizdeki silah artıklarını memnuniyetle kabul edeceğiz — ve eğer isterseniz, bireysel siparişler de alabiliriz!"
languages.original_text: "My Guild can't rightly claim to have distinguished clients such as yourself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We make weapons for the undiscerning public. Still, we'll gladly accept any weapon scraps you might have for recycling — and take on individual orders, if you so wish!"

traits.locale_text: "Loncam sizin gibi seçkin müşterilere sahip olduğunu iddia edemez, Lord Hazretleri. Bizler anlayışsız halk için silah üretiyoruz. Yine de, geri dönüşüm için elinizdeki silah artıklarını memnuniyetle kabul edeceğiz — ve eğer isterseniz, bireysel siparişler de alabiliriz!"
